decisionBoundary: This public-safe manifest separates proof buckets. It does not create buyer evidence, production deploy approval, Supabase advisor clearance, or launch-ready status.

items.label: Last approved production artifact
items.evidenceBoundary: Only proves the deployed artifact checked during the latest approved deploy; it does not prove production parity for future source commits, which require an approved deploy and another live parity run.
items.nextAction: Rerun after every approved production deploy before calling live parity current.

items.label: Current source live parity
items.command: pnpm run report:production-approval-packet && pnpm run check:post-deploy-live
items.evidenceBoundary: Current source does not prove production parity from local checks, CI, or the last approved artifact; it requires clean provenance, explicit owner approval, guarded deploy, and post-deploy live parity.
items.nextAction: Clear source provenance, request explicit owner approval, deploy through the guarded production path, then rerun post-deploy live checks.

items.label: Current source release gate
items.command: pnpm run check:release-readiness && gh run list --repo sanjabh11/canada-energy-dashboard --limit 5
items.evidenceBoundary: Local and CI checks must be refreshed for the current SHA; a source check does not prove production deploy parity.
items.nextAction: Run source and CI checks before any approval packet or release request.

items.label: Source provenance and dirty-worktree gate
items.evidenceBoundary: Deploy requests require clean main-branch source provenance. The local packet classifies dirty paths by staged-only, unstaged-only, mixed, untracked, or ignored state, but this public manifest does not prove current local cleanliness or production approval.
items.nextAction: Rerun the approval packet, resolve any staged-only or unstaged source blockers, then run the full release gate before any production deploy request.

items.label: Launch blocker action queue
items.command: pnpm run report:commercial-launch-readiness && pnpm run report:launch-evidence-manifest
items.evidenceBoundary: The launch blocker action queue sequences source provenance, release toolchain, branch review, Supabase advisor access, buyer evidence, production approval, and post-deploy live proof, but it does not deploy, merge, contact buyers, mutate branches, clear blockers, or create launch readiness; it does not create launch readiness.
items.nextAction: Work the queue in order, keep source provenance and approval gates first-class, then rerun the commercial launch readiness report and launch evidence manifest.

items.label: Production approval prerequisite queue
items.command: pnpm run report:commercial-launch-readiness && pnpm run report:launch-evidence-manifest
items.evidenceBoundary: The production approval prerequisite queue sequences clean source provenance, Corepack release-readiness, canonical branch review, Supabase advisor clearance, buyer evidence, explicit owner approval, and post-deploy live proof, but it does not prove production approval, deploy, push, merge, mutate branches, contact buyers, access Supabase, clear source provenance, or claim post-deploy live parity.
items.nextAction: Clear every prerequisite row, request explicit owner approval only after the queue is ready, then rerun the launch evidence manifest and production approval packet.

items.label: Post-deploy live proof gate queue
items.command: pnpm run report:commercial-launch-readiness && pnpm run report:launch-evidence-manifest
items.evidenceBoundary: The post-deploy live proof gate queue sequences production approval clearance, guarded deploy completion, live public metadata, live static dist parity, hosted proof-pack route smoke, and current-source hosted parity claim, but it does not prove current hosted/live parity, deploy, push, rebuild, mutate Netlify, access live accounts, or run browser smoke.
items.nextAction: Use it only after explicit owner approval and the guarded deploy path; current-source hosted parity is not claimable until pnpm run check:post-deploy-live passes.

items.label: Unmerged branch review queue
items.command: pnpm run report:unmerged-branch-readiness && pnpm run report:launch-evidence-manifest
items.evidenceBoundary: High-risk unmerged branches are review queues; current launch evidence carries review-first packet summaries and canonical-head state, but this does not create launch evidence, buyer proof, production approval, merges, checkouts, migrations, or deploys.
items.nextAction: Review the review-first packets, choose canonical heads for split families, complete security and release checks, and merge only through normal release gates.

items.label: Buyer evidence 95% gate
items.evidenceBoundary: No buyer-proven market confidence without accepted buyer rows, reviewer evidence, commercial signal, and retained artifact hashes.
items.nextAction: Collect real anonymized buyer evidence and keep rehearsal rows at confidence_delta=0.

items.label: Supabase connector advisors
items.command: Supabase MCP security/performance advisors for qnymbecjgeaoxsfphrti
items.evidenceBoundary: CLI lint does not substitute for connector-backed advisors; current advisor evidence remains account-authorization dependent.
items.nextAction: Fix Supabase connector or project authorization, then rerun security and performance advisors.
